nasb.text: They will come and will declare His righteousness To a people who will be born, that He has performed it.

esv.text: they shall come and proclaim his righteousness to a people yet unborn, that he has done it.

cnv.text: 他們要把他的公義傳給以後出生的民， 說明這是他所作的。

ccb.text: 他们也要向未来的世代传讲祂的公义作为。

csbs.text: 他们必来向将出生的民宣告他的公义—— 他已经成就了这公义！
